---
title: "Miss Durton"
---

## Miss Durton

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1887-90)

### Biography

She offered Good Friday, another story about Ottavia, to <i>MP</i> in 1889; she may have lived abroad.  Both 'Ottavia' <i>MP</i> 1887(2) 87 and 'A Good Friday Procession at Grassina'  <i>MP</i> (1890) (1) 371 appeared under the name 'E.Vere'.

### Letters

- Letter from April 3d 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
